note: Intended-design flow for roadmap 1-4 (view grouped menu + done status board), plus the as-built Stage B done-board sequence: /gogo:done (no slug) classifies work, opens the terminal-TUI kanban (board.py in tmux) or the table + multi-select fallback, then ships each pick via the single archive+link flow. The as-is baseline is in charts/before/.

diagrams.title: Intended: view selection menu (plans + reports) + /gogo:done status board
As-built: /gogo:done work board (TUI or table fallback) -> single-sourced ship
